author: y4rr
content: Cascade skip ENCODER_DECODER_FIXTURE_KEY_MISMATCH is still true. Verified: fixture encoder_layer_forward entries have keys attn_q_proj/attn_k_proj/attn_v_proj/attn_out_proj/ffn_w1/ffn_b1/ffn_w2/ffn_b2, but the test extracts weight_q_proj/weight_k_proj/weight_v_proj/weight_out_proj. Real key mismatch confirmed. Fixture regeneration required (scripts/regenerate_nn_attention_fixtures.py or equivalent). Filed crosslink follow-up for fixture regen work. Leaving open as active divergence.
